core_principles: Clarity over Style: If it doesn't help the engineer make a decision, delete it.
Traffic Light Protocol: Risk colors (Red/Orange/Yellow/Green) are sacred. Never use them for decoration.
Mobile-First Ergonomics: Buttons must be thumb-accessible (48px+ touch targets).
Progressive Disclosure: Show the threat title and risk level first. Reveal details on tap.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.header: p-5 border-b border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between

buttons.primary: rounded-lg font-semibold h-11 px-6 shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full shadow-lg bg-blue-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-blue-700 z-50

chat.input_area: bg-white border-t border-slate-200 p-4 pb-8 md:pb-4 shadow-lg z-10
chat.bubble_user: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-end shadow-sm
chat.bubble_ai: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-start shadow-sm
chat.bubble_system: bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-xs rounded-full px-3 py-1 self-center my-2

threat_card.wrapper: group relative flex flex-col justify-between space-y-4 rounded-xl border p-6 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
threat_card.title: font-bold text-lg pr-8 line-clamp-1

universal_guidelines: Use 'Inter' for all UI text and 'JetBrains Mono' for IDs, codes, and logs.
Buttons must have a specialized 'loading' state.
All cards must have a 1px border. No borderless cards in this engineering context.
For charts, use 'Recharts' within Shadcn cards. Keep them simple: Bar, Line, or Area only.
Accessibility: Ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
Animations: Use 'Framer Motion' for entering lists (staggered fade-in).
